subject: Re: Warp crashes when boxnet model is to run
body:
Also, sorry to forget to mention it before, I am using Warp verison 1.0.6

On Wednesday, May 22, 2019 at 4:15:57 PM UTC+2, Panagiotis Kastritis wrote:
>
> Dear Dimitry, 
>
> First thanks a lot for your Warp software. I have installed it on my 
> Glacios microscope in Halle and looks really good! I have an i7-3770 Cpu 
> 3.4 GHz, 32 GB of RAM, an RTX2070 a solid state drive of 512 GB, and a 
> system running Windows 7. All calculations at the micrograph level work 
> fine and calculations keep up with the speed of acquisition smoothly.
>
> However, if I want to pick particles, when I select a boxnet model, e.g. 
> BoxNet2_20180602, installed under C:\......\Warp\boxnet2models\, when I 
> press start processing, Warp crashes. Do you have any idea why? 
>
> Thanks, 
>
> Panos
>
